##LOCALITY=Fuka mine, Bicchu-cho, Okayama Prefecture, Japan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless platy, frozen in matrix, polytype 2M, associated with perovskite R120121, spurrite and gehlenite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120122
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
